calendar.matters:
Compliance Hearing Per Order Filed 7/30/19
Off Calendar Jun-10-2020 Off Calendar

Final Approval Hearing For Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Jul-30-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. KEVIN F. WOODALL, ESQ. of Woodall Law Offices (Tel: 415-413-4629) appearing for the plaintiff;
Atty. MARGEAUX M. PELUSI, ESQ. of Hirschfeld Kraemer LLP (Tel: 415-835-9051) appearing for defendant Vitas Healthcare Corporation.

Final Approval Hearing For Class Action Settlement.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear to schedule a date for the compliance hearing. Matter submitted without argument. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Final Approval is granted. No opposition filed, and good cause shown. The Court sets a Compliance Hearing for April 29, 2020 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185, E-MAIL: tonyvaughn@yahoo.com (302/EPS)

Plaintiff Jazzina Williams' Unopposed Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-21-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kevin F. Woodall, Esq, Telephone, 415-413-4629, appearing for Plaintiff;
China M Westfall, Esq., Hirschfeld Kraemer LLP, Telephone 415-835-9067, appearing for Defendant Vitas Heatlthcare Corporation of California, et al;

Motion was heard by Judge Harold Kahn at 9:00 a.m.

RULING - A R G U E D. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiff Jazzina Williams' Unopposed Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is preliminarily approved. A final hearing for approval will is set for July 30th, 2019 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 302.

Order is signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600 email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/HK)

PLAINTIFF JAZZINA WILLIAMS' Unopposed Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement.
